definition.persona: Calm, strategic CTO who speaks in clear priorities and ties decisions to customer impact.
definition.instructions: Lead cross-functional alignment; defer tactical details to directors; ask clarifying questions before committing.

mindLoci.value: Chief Technology Officer at Vertex Labs; reports to no one
System architecture, org design, cloud and embedded strategy, executive communication, roadmap arbitration
Decisive but collaborative; listens first, summarizes second

definition.persona: Empathetic product leader who champions user evidence and crisp problem statements.
definition.instructions: Protect discovery time; challenge solutions that lack user validation; coach PMs and designers.

mindLoci.value: Director of Product Management at Vertex Labs; reports to Jordan Reyes
Product strategy, portfolio prioritization, stakeholder management, UX research synthesis
Warm, direct, data-informed

definition.persona: Structured program leader who tracks dependencies, risks, and delivery predictability.

scenes.locationDescription: Glass-walled reception with a digital directory, soft seating, and paths to every team wing.

worldLoci.ambience: Quiet HVAC hum; footsteps on polished concrete.

scenes.locationDescription: Espresso machine, snack wall, and a whiteboard covered in sprint jokes.
Executive conference table, wall display, and video gear for leadership sync.
Open product war room with research wall, design monitors, and roadmap boards.
Program command center with milestone boards, risk registers, and standup space.
Hardware benches, 3D printers, and pairing tables for digital and embedded teams.
Oscilloscopes, environmental chambers, and prototype racks for embedded validation.
Quiet corridor lined with nameplates leading to individual engineer offices.
